name: 3 Oceans
famous_for: Chardonnay and Shiraz from the Margaret River region
description: 3 Oceans is a major winemaking operation in Margaret River celebrating Western Australia's dramatic coastline and pristine environment. Their cellar door offers a curated selection of single-vineyard and regional wines.

name: Aravina Estate
famous_for: Award-winning wines, garden-to-table dining and a sports car museum
description: Aravina Estate is a Margaret River winery and destination restaurant in Yallingup, established in 2010, combining award-winning wines with fine dining. The estate features a cellar door for tastings, modern Australian cuisine, manicured gardens and a renowned sports car museum.

name: Ashbrook Estate
famous_for: Elegant premium wines; James Halliday recognition
description: A family-owned estate in Wilyabrup operating for over 40 years, Ashbrook produces elegant, handcrafted varietal wines using sustainable vineyard practices. Renowned for understated quality and exceptional value, the winery runs a quiet cellar door focused on premium wine experiences.

name: Bettenay's
famous_for: Premium wines and decadent hand-crafted nougat
description: Established in 1989 by the Bettenay family in Cowaramup, this boutique estate produces premium Cabernet Sauvignon, Chardonnay and Shiraz alongside its renowned hand-crafted nougat. Guests enjoy a distinctive cellar door experience paired with lakeside dining and on-site accommodation.

name: Blind Corner
famous_for: Certified organic and biodynamic natural wines
description: A certified organic and biodynamic winery in Yallingup with 20 years of heritage, Blind Corner crafts naturally made wines using old-world techniques with new-world innovation. Their cellar door welcomes visitors to taste biodynamically grown wines beside the working vineyard.

name: Brown Hill
famous_for: Bold red wines, particularly Cabernet Sauvignon
description: Brown Hill Estate is a family-owned Margaret River winery where all fruit is hand-picked and hand-sorted at harvest. Visitors enjoy tastings in a welcoming cellar door open daily, in a warm family setting that celebrates the estate's journey from bare paddock to premium wines.

name: Cape Mentelle
famous_for: Benchmark Cabernet Sauvignon and Shiraz
description: Cape Mentelle is a pioneering Margaret River winery established in the early 1970s, known for terroir-driven wines of exceptional quality and consistency. The estate welcomes visitors to its cellar door for tastings and tours of its acclaimed vineyard.

name: Churchview
famous_for: Certified organic wines, especially Chardonnay
description: Churchview Estate is a family-owned organic winery in Metricup, established in 1999, growing 16 grape varieties across 100 hectares. The cellar door offers tastings of premium, rare wines paired with optional ploughman's lunches or picnics overlooking the vineyards.

name: Cullen Wines
famous_for: Biodynamic, award-winning Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay
description: A premier biodynamic and organic winery in Wilyabrup, founded in 1971 and now in its third generation under Vanya Cullen. Cullen produces award-winning wines with a focus on exceptional Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay, crafted through certified biodynamic viticulture.

name: Deep Woods
famous_for: Cabernet, Chardonnay and Rose; Halliday Five Red Star
description: An award-winning Margaret River estate perched on a ridge above a secluded valley of native jarrah and marri. Deep Woods produces acclaimed Cabernet Sauvignon, Reserve Chardonnay and Rose, poured in a modern cellar door set in a stunning natural setting.

name: Edwards Wines
famous_for: Hand-crafted quality wines with family heritage
description: Edwards Wines is a hand-crafted Margaret River winery in Cowaramup where quality wines are paired with a warm family story. The cellar door welcomes guests daily for attentive service and tastings in a distinctive setting.

name: Evoi Wines
famous_for: Halliday 5-star wines; WA Winery of the Year
description: An acclaimed boutique Margaret River winery holding a James Halliday 5-star rating and named a Western Australian Winery of the Year. Visitors enjoy premium cellar-door tastings in a small-batch estate known for excellence.

name: Fermoy Estate
famous_for: World-class Cabernet Sauvignon
description: Fermoy Estate is a family-owned Wilyabrup winery established in 1985, crafting refined Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay with a philosophy of precision and elegance. The cellar door offers guided tastings and seasonal small bites, indoors or in the vineyard gardens.

name: Fraser Gallop
famous_for: Cabernet Sauvignon; Decanter Best in Show; Halliday 5-star
description: Fraser Gallop Estate is a Halliday 5-star Wilyabrup winery producing exceptional single-vineyard wines with a focus on precision and purity. The intimate cellar door welcomes guests daily to taste award-winning Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay overlooking the vineyard.

name: Glenarty Road
famous_for: Farm-to-table dining and minimal-intervention wines; award-winning regional restaurant
description: Glenarty Road is a fifth-generation family farm in Karridale where premium minimal-intervention wines and farm-to-table dining thrive across 81 hectares of regeneratively managed land. Guests enjoy cellar-door tastings alongside seasonal cuisine from estate-grown produce and grass-fed meats in a rustic farmhouse setting.

name: Gralyn Estate
famous_for: Famous fortifieds; premium Cabernet and Chardonnay
description: Gralyn Estate is a family-owned Wilyabrup winery established in 1975, now in its second generation, renowned for premium estate wines and exceptional fortifieds from mature, non-irrigated vines. Visitors explore the cellar door with tastings of celebrated Chardonnay, Cabernet and award-winning fortified wines.

name: Hamelin Bay
famous_for: Award-winning estate wines and scenic cellar-door dining
description: Established in 1992 by the Drake-Brockman family, Hamelin Bay is a boutique Karridale winery producing elegant whites and structured reds from gravelly loam soils. The estate sits on a north-facing ridge with panoramic vineyard, valley and karri-forest views, with a welcoming cellar door and on-site restaurant.

name: Hayshed Hill
famous_for: Premium Chardonnay and Cabernet; 20-vintage winemaking legacy
description: One of Margaret River's pioneering wineries, Hayshed Hill offers a beautiful cellar door for seated tastings of an extensive range of wines. The intimate setting is the perfect backdrop to explore renowned Chardonnays and Cabernet blends with vineyard views.

name: House of Cards
famous_for: Certified-organic single-vineyard, hand-crafted wines
description: House of Cards is a certified-organic, single-vineyard winery where Elizabeth and Travis Wray craft handmade wines using traditional methods like hand-plunging and basket pressing. Visitors enjoy intimate tastings and local cheese platters at a relaxed cellar door overlooking the natural landscape.

name: Howard Park
famous_for: Award-winning sparkling and premium estate wines
description: Howard Park is an acclaimed Margaret River estate spanning 138 hectares of vines and native bushland near Cowaramup. The architecturally striking cellar door welcomes visitors to taste award-winning wines, with spacious lawns ideal for a picnic.

name: Leeuwin Estate
address: Stevens Rd, Margaret River Western Australia 6285
famous_for: Art Series Chardonnay and Cabernet; the Leeuwin Concerts
description: Leeuwin Estate is a renowned Margaret River producer devoted to the art of fine wine, set amid rolling lawns and karri forest. The cellar door offers seated tastings in an art-gallery setting, complemented by an acclaimed restaurant and the celebrated Leeuwin Concert series.

name: LS Merchants
famous_for: Clean, expressive minimal-intervention wines; award-winning Chardonnay
description: LS Merchants is a handcrafted boutique winery (founded 2015) embracing minimal-intervention winemaking across diverse South West varietals. Their Cowaramup cellar door offers seated tastings overlooking the vineyard, balancing premium classics with experimental, approachable wines.

name: Marri Wood Park
famous_for: Demeter-certified biodynamic wines, especially Sparkling Chenin Blanc
description: A family-owned Demeter-certified biodynamic vineyard established in 1992, Marri Wood Park crafts pure expressions of Margaret River terroir using chemical-free practices. Visitors retreat to an intimate rustic cellar door in native bushland for tastings of biodynamic wines, from lively sparkling to serious estate reds.

name: McHenry Hohnen
famous_for: Biodynamic single-vineyard wines
description: A biodynamically certified estate in Margaret River's south producing minimal-intervention, single-vineyard wines that express place. The expanded Witchcliffe cellar door pairs guided tastings with seasonal Mediterranean cuisine and a Vintners wine bar sourced from estate farms.

name: Menzies Vineyard
famous_for: High-density vineyard and organic, hand-crafted wines
description: A family-owned Wilyabrup winery featuring one of Australia's rare high-density vineyards, with vines planted at four times standard density to deepen terroir expression. Rob and Emma Menzies welcome visitors to an intimate cellar door for hand-picked, organically grown wines.

name: Mr. Barval
famous_for: Italian-influenced Margaret River wines
description: Mr Barval is a boutique Margaret River winery founded by Robert Gherardi, drawing on three generations of family winemaking and Italian techniques from Barolo. The cellar door welcomes visitors daily for Italian-inspired wines paired with local cheeses and artisanal condiments.

name: Passel Estate
famous_for: Trophy-winning sparkling and small-batch reds; conservation focus
description: A family-owned boutique winery in a Margaret River bushland setting, crafting small-batch wines while stewarding a native flora sanctuary. The cellar door invites visitors to taste premium Shiraz, Cabernet and Chardonnay while supporting conservation of the endangered Western Ringtail Possum.

name: Pierro
famous_for: Cult-status Chardonnay of monumental weight and texture
description: Pierro is a boutique Wilyabrup estate founded in 1979 by Dr Michael Peterkin, known for unconventional high-density viticulture and uncompromising winemaking. It produces stylish, complex whites and exceptional reds, poured at an intimate rammed-earth cellar door set among the vines with creek views.

name: Si Vintners
famous_for: Biodynamic, minimal-intervention natural wines; skin-contact styles
description: Si Vintners is a biodynamically certified Margaret River estate in Rosa Glen, dedicated to minimal-intervention winemaking from its own dry-grown vines. Founded by Sarah Morris and Iwo Jakimowicz, it produces distinctive natural wines, welcoming visitors by appointment for cellar-door tastings.

name: Skigh Wine
famous_for: Minimal-intervention natural wines with wild ferments
description: Skigh Wine is an intimate boutique minimal-intervention winery set among Yallingup's gardens, making small-batch natural wines that showcase Margaret River fruit with old-world flair. The rustic barn cellar door offers personalised tastings across its classic, Coda and experimental ranges in a laid-back setting.

name: Stella Bella
famous_for: Premium Chardonnay and Cabernet; the Suckfizzle range
description: A boutique Margaret River winery producing wines of elegant finesse and precision from the region's pristine southern terroir. The cellar door, just minutes from town, invites visitors to experience an award-winning portfolio in a charming, unpretentious vineyard setting.

name: Stormflower
famous_for: Certified-organic, minimal-intervention wines and sparkling
description: Stormflower is a boutique certified-organic winery in Wilyabrup producing elegant, handcrafted wines entirely from estate-grown fruit. Visitors enjoy a relaxed, naturally designed cellar door and can unwind with a picnic rug in the gardens, surrounded by nine hectares of sustainably managed vineyard.

name: Vasse Felix
famous_for: Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay; the region's founding winery
description: Vasse Felix is Margaret River's founding wine estate (established 1967), offering a premium cellar-door experience of estate-grown wines made with minimal intervention. Visitors enjoy tastings, fine dining, art installations and guided vineyard tours across the Home Vineyard overlooking Wilyabrup Brook.

name: Voyager Estate
famous_for: Cabernet Sauvignon and manicured gardens
description: Voyager Estate is a Margaret River winery built on generations of farming heritage, where certified-organic viticulture and sustainable practices shape every bottle. Visitors experience estate-grown wines, manicured Cape Dutch gardens, a seasonal restaurant and immersive vineyard experiences.

name: Wills Domain
famous_for: Cabernet, Shiraz and sparkling; award-winning restaurant
description: Wills Domain is a prestigious estate on 60 hectares of sun-drenched slopes in Yallingup's Gunyulgup Valley, with sweeping views across vine-covered hills. The cellar door pairs exceptional estate-grown wines with curated snacks, alongside an acclaimed fine-dining restaurant in an unforgettable vineyard setting.

name: Windows Estate
famous_for: Certified-organic, hand-crafted wines and private picnic tastings
description: A boutique Margaret River winery owned by Chris and Joanne Davies, regarded as one of the region's most exciting producers. The cellar door welcomes visitors daily for curated tastings and gourmet picnics on the manicured lawn or by the vineyard dam.

name: Woodlands
famous_for: Heritage Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay from dry-grown vines
description: Established in 1973, Woodlands is one of Margaret River's pioneering wineries, crafting premium wines from certified-organic vineyards in the Wilyabrup Valley. The cellar door welcomes visitors for hand-picked, traditionally made wines in a warm, family-friendly setting with seated tastings and gourmet cheese platters.

name: Xanadu Wines
famous_for: International award-winning Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay
description: Xanadu is a pioneering Margaret River estate established in 1977, set among stunning vineyard views with a tranquil courtyard. A minimalist winemaking philosophy expresses the region's true character, with a cellar door and fine-dining restaurant showcasing globally awarded Cabernet Sauvignon and Chardonnay.

name: Yeah Wine
famous_for: Lesser-known varieties and natural winemaking
description: Yeah Wine is a Margaret River producer crafting handmade, small-batch wines that showcase the personality of single-vineyard sources. Founded in 2020 by Andrew Dawson and Sian, the cellar door welcomes families and dogs in a warm, approachable setting for natural, experimental wines.
